title: ERGSN Maker Directory Entry
description: One Korean manufacturer prospect with at least one homepage URL (Korean and/or English). Generated and updated by scripts/discover-makers/. Each entry's status field tracks where it sits in the funnel: raw → verified → contacted → onboarded (or rejected).

id.description: Stable lowercase slug, derived from homepageHost minus TLD (e.g. 'cosmax-com'). Never change after first save — used for dedup.

legalName.description: Full legal company name as it appears on the corporate site / About page (Romanised when given).

displayName.description: Short brand/display name for tables and UI.

sector.description: Best-guess ERGSN sector. 'uncategorised' until manual review.

subCategory.description: Optional within-sector grouping (e.g. cosmetics-OEM, CCTV-DVR). Free-form for now.

homepageHost.description: Bare host of the canonical homepage, lowercase, no port, no www. (e.g. 'cosmax.com'). Dedup key.

koreanHomepageUrl.description: Best Korean-language homepage URL (often the root).

englishHomepageUrl.description: Best English-language homepage URL — may be the same host /en/ subpath, en.host subdomain, or a separate host.

englishDetectedBy.description: How the English homepage was identified. Sets confidence — manual = highest.

headquartersCountry.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2 (default 'KR' for this directory) — captured to filter out non-Korean false positives.

businessType.description: Filter for 'manufacturer' / 'manufacturer-trader' — others are deprioritised. 'unclear' until verification step.

exportSignals.description: Free-text signals that the company exports (e.g. 'Incoterms mentioned', 'tradeKorea profile', 'KOTRA certified'). Used to rank.

structuredDataHints.description: Raw extraction artefacts so we can re-parse later without re-fetching.

contact.description: Contact points harvested from the homepage / contact page. Mirrors data/maker-contacts.json's contact dict so onboarded makers can be promoted into that registry without remapping.

email.description: Primary email; usually overseas@ / sales@ / global@.

factoryAddress.description: Distinct from headquartersAddress; many Korean SMEs publish both.

contactPageUrl.description: Direct URL to the maker's /contact page (used as a richer source than the homepage when LLM-fetched).

sources.description: Where this maker was discovered. Multiple entries when re-discovered from a different seed — useful trust signal.

seedQuery.description: The query / category / page that surfaced this maker, for reproducibility.

status.description: Funnel state. raw = freshly discovered, no human review. verified = LLM/heuristic + human OK. pending = revisit. contacted = outreach sent. onboarded = at least one product registered. rejected = manual exclude.

contractSigned.description: True when the maker has signed a partner contract with ERGSN. Used to filter onboarded vs contracted relationships in the maker review UI.

contractDate.description: When the contract was marked signed in the UI.

rejectedReason.description: If status=rejected, why — keep so future seed runs don't re-add.
